summary_en: ¥15.20/share for FY3/27 (¥12.20 ordinary + ¥3.00 25th-anniversary special), totaling ¥667M. Full-year dividend unchanged from FY3/26. Policy: payout ratio floor 50.0% or prior guidance, whichever higher.
title_en: Notice regarding FY3/27 fiscal year-end dividend (planned) and 25th anniversary commemorative dividend (planned)
translation_en_brief: eBASE Co., Ltd. announced on 15 May 2026 its dividend policy for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2027 (FY3/27). The company will pay ¥15.20 per share, consisting of ¥12.20 ordinary dividend and ¥3.00 special anniversary dividend to commemorate its 25th founding anniversary occurring in October 2026. Total dividend payout is estimated at ¥667 million. The full-year dividend remains unchanged from FY3/26 at ¥15.20 per share, with no interim dividend. The formal decision on the dividend will be made by board resolution in late May 2027. The company's dividend policy targets a payout ratio of 50.0% as the baseline, or the higher of the prior guidance, balancing stable shareholder returns, earnings distribution, and business expansion.
